scripts.build: bash -i -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && rm -rf dist/iis && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --configuration production && cp -R dist/DocsNexusPMS/browser/. dist/DocsNexusPMS/ && cp web.config dist/DocsNexusPMS/web.config && rm -rf dist/DocsNexusPMS/browser dist/DocsNexusPMS/prerendered-routes.json dist/DocsNexusPMS/data dist/DocsNexusPMS/uploads'
scripts.release: bash -i -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && rm -rf dist/iis && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --configuration production && cp -R dist/DocsNexusPMS/browser/. dist/DocsNexusPMS/ && cp web.config dist/DocsNexusPMS/web.config && rm -rf dist/DocsNexusPMS/browser dist/DocsNexusPMS/prerendered-routes.json dist/DocsNexusPMS/data dist/DocsNexusPMS/uploads && rm -rf dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api && DOTNET_CMD=$(command -v dotnet || echo /usr/local/share/dotnet/dotnet) && "$DOTNET_CMD" publish API/NexusPms.Api.csproj -c Release -o ./dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api && mkdir -p public/data/guides public/uploads dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api/public/data/guides dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api/public/uploads dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api/logs && node ./scripts/enable-api-stdout-log.mjs && cp -R public/data/. dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api/public/data/ && cp -R public/uploads/. dist/DocsNexusPMS/Api/public/uploads/'
scripts.watch: bash -i -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && ng build --watch --configuration development'
